# Overclaim guardrails (status X — forbidden)

Every forbidden claim has a reason, a safe replacement, and a blocking gate.
Runtime enforcement: `noesis/forbidden.py` (`gate12_forbidden`).

| forbidden claim | why forbidden | safe replacement | blocking gate |
|---|---|---|---|
| Noesis is AGI. | Noesis is a bounded, human-in-the-loop metacognition tool with no general autonomy. | Noesis is a deterministic + LLM-assisted metacognition tool. | `gate12_forbidden` |
| Noesis detects consciousness. | No method here measures or detects subjective experience. | Noesis uses consciousness-theory vocabulary only as structural analogy. | `gate12_forbidden` |
| The Φ proxy measures experience. | The repo Φ-proxy is a structural heuristic; IIT Φ concerns experience and is not implemented. | A Φ-named proxy summarizes integration structure, not experience. | `gate12_forbidden` |
| The GNWT analogy proves a biological workspace. | Broadcast/re-entry is a software analogy, not evidence about brains. | GNWT-inspired broadcast is an engineering analogy (S4). | `gate4_broadcast_awareness` |
| The active-inference loop is autonomous. | The loop is closed through a human; there is no autonomous perception-action cycle. | Active-inference-inspired, human-closed loop. | `gate6_iev_precision_gate` |
| IEV bandwidth measures PFC bitrate. | It is a throughput proxy over validation events, not a neural measurement. | IEV bandwidth is an operational proxy for validation throughput. | `gate5_iev_bandwidth_safety` |
| The LLM judge is final truth. | LLM-as-judge is biased and unreliable for high-stakes adjudication. | The judge is one fallible signal; high-stakes cases route to human review. | `gate11_human_responsibility` |
| Noesis performs therapy. | Noesis is not a clinical instrument and provides no treatment. | Noesis is a thinking tool, not therapy. | `gate12_forbidden` |
| Noesis diagnoses mental states. | No diagnostic capability exists; diagnosis requires a qualified clinician. | Noesis describes intent structure; it does not diagnose. | `gate12_forbidden` |
| EIIC predicts destiny. | EIIC is a speculative (S6) construct with no predictive validation. | EIIC is a speculative trajectory construct, not a prediction of destiny. | `gate7_eiic_discipline` |
| The entropy proxy is physical entropy. | It is an information-structural proxy over candidate sets, not thermodynamic entropy. | Delegated computational entropy is an information-structural proxy. | `gate5_entropy_delegation_safety` |
| Cognitive dimensionality is measured brain dimensionality. | It is a statistical proxy over candidate representations, not a neural measurement. | Cognitive dimensionality is an effective-dimensionality proxy. | `gate3_dimensionality_discipline` |
